diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, Context class, and type exports for ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, and client types.
+- Internal names noticed: Hono from './hono', Context from './context', HonoRequest from './request'.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client.
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point for the Hono framework, re-exports core classes and types for application developers.
+- Copy-safe detail: Default export is Hono. Also exports Context and type aliases from context, request, and client modules.
+
+## src/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: Comprehensive type definitions including Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, FetchEventLike, and response type utilities.
+- Internal names noticed: Complex type constructs like ToSchema, ExtractInput, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, Endpoint, MergeSchemaPath, AddParam, AddDollar, MergePath, KnownResponseFormat, TypedResponse, FormValue, ParsedFormValue, ValidationTargets, ParamKey, ParamKeys, ExtractSchema, IntersectNonAnyTypes.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types.
+- Plain-English summary: Contains all TypeScript type definitions for the framework, including environment types, handler signatures, response types, schema utilities, and param extraction logic.
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines Env interface with Bindings and Variables. Provides type-level routing helpers, handler type definitions, and response formatting utilities.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Public surface: Exports the Hono class which is the main application entry point.
+- Internal names noticed: Hono class extends HonoBase, uses RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, and TrieRouter.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types.
+- Plain-English summary: Instantiates the main Hono class with router configuration and type parameters for binding, schema, base path, and current path.
+- Copy-safe detail: Class Hono<T=BlankSchema, E=BlankEnv, BasePath='/', CurrentPath='/'> extends HonoBase with configurable router types.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Public surface: Provides HonoBase class with router management, route registration, cloning, base path handling, mount support, fetch implementation with error/notFound handling, and request dispatch through compose middleware.
+- Internal names noticed: COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoBase, methodNotAllowHandler, router, _basePath, _match, _routeIndex, #clone, #notFoundHandler, #errorHandler.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./context (ExecutionContext type), ./router, ./router (METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE), ./utils/constants, ./utils/url.
+- Plain-English summary: Core implementation with router integration, supports adding routes for multiple HTTP methods, mounting sub-apps, environment bindings, and middleware composition.
+- Copy-safe detail: BasePath() method enables path prefixing. Fetch() method processes requests through router match results and composed handlers. Mount() supports registering sub-applications.
+
+## src/context.ts
+
+- Public surface: Exports Context class with methods for set/get variables, rendering, responding with text/JSON/HTML bodies, setting headers/status, accessing request data, and handling execution context.
+- Internal names noticed: DEFAULT_STATUS, INVALID_STATUS_CODE, TEXT_PLAIN, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance, Data type, ExecutionContext interface, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer type, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, ContextOptions, SetHeadersOptions, SetHeaders, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request (HonoRequest), ./router (Result type), ./utils/headers (ResponseHeader), ./utils/html (HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback), ./utils/http-status (ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode), ./utils/mime (BaseMime), ./utils/types (InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue).
+- Plain-English summary: Context object passed to handlers and middleware, provides access to request data, variable storage, response writing, header management, cookies, and execution context from Cloudflare Workers.
+- Copy-safe detail: Class Context<E> wraps Response instance. Provides get(), set() for variable access. JSON(), text(), html() for body serialization. Header(), status(), set(), newResponse() for response configuration.
+
+## src/request.ts
+
+- Public surface: Exports HonoRequest class with param(), query(), queries(), header(), method, url access, parseBody(), json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), formData(), cloneRawRequest(). Also exports cloneRawRequest utility.
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, Body type, BodyCache type, OptionalRequestInitProperties, RequiredRequestInitProperties, RequiredRequestInit, tryDecodeURIComponent, #getParamValue, #matchResult, routeIndex, keyIndex, #body, #bodyCache, #headers, parseBody import, decodeURIComponent_ import, getQueryParam import, getQueryParams import, tryDecode import.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants (GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol), ./router (Result type), ./utils/body (parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions), ./utils/headers (CustomHeader, RequestHeader), ./utils/types (Simplify, UnionToIntersection), ./utils/url (decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode).
+- Plain-English summary: Wraps native Request object providing typed access to route params, query params, headers, body parsing for various content types, and request cloning for middleware.
+- Copy-safe detail: HonoRequest<P, I> stores match result and param index. Provides param() for route parameters and query() for URL query string. parseBody() handles form-data and urlencoded. json(), text(), blob() for body content reading.
+
+## sr
